title: lobelia orientalis
intro: Lobelia orientalis, also known as Indian tobacco or Chinese lobelia, is a plant species that belongs to the Lobeliaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Lobelia orientalis has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Lobelia orientalis, such as tinctures and teas, are often used to treat these conditions, although it is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
